body_txt: A speech impediment is a condition affecting some people that hinders their speaking abilities. Unfortunately, those afflicted with a speech impediment tend to be seen as less intelligent than those without. As a result, speech impediments are almost always given to stupid or awkward characters. May be faked as Obfuscating Stupidity , or has to be overcome to look intelligent . Rarely is The Hero or a Love Interest affected with this , frequently The Loser . Not to be confused with scared stuttering. May manifest as a lisp, or as a stutter . Or it may weveo itself as a weawy pwofound twoubo with the wettehs aw and ehw . May overlap with Verbal Tic . Could be caused by Fang Thpeak . Elmuh Fudd Syndwome is a Subtrope (and so is Porky Pig Pronunciation ). Can lead to Viewer Name Confusion . See also Electronic Speech Impediment .
